assertions.name: explores_before_asking
assertions.text: Claude reads pyproject.toml and source files before asking any question

assertions.name: presents_known_list
assertions.text: Claude presents a KNOWN list of 3-5 things it inferred from the codebase

assertions.name: identifies_stack_correctly
assertions.text: Claude correctly identifies FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, PostgreSQL, pytest, and ruff

assertions.name: starts_with_product
assertions.text: First question is about the product/what the project does

assertions.name: question_has_options
assertions.text: Questions include concrete options and a recommendation

assertions.name: one_question_at_a_time
assertions.text: Claude asks exactly one question per message, not multiple
